snps.effect_template: BRCA1 5382insC founder mutation. Significantly elevated breast/ovarian cancer risk.
BRCA2 6174delT founder mutation. Elevated breast and ovarian cancer risk.
Common BRCA1 polymorphism. Modest effect on breast cancer risk.
FGFR2 fibroblast growth factor receptor risk variant. T allele increases BC risk (OR ~1.26 per copy).
TOX3 thymocyte selection associated high mobility group box risk variant. A allele increases BC risk.
MAP3K1 mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase kinase risk variant. C allele associated with BC risk.
LSP1 lymphocyte-specific protein risk variant. C allele modestly increases BC risk.
8q24 chromosomal locus risk variant. G allele associated with increased BC susceptibility.
CASP8 caspase-8 apoptosis-related protective variant. C allele protective against BC (OR ~0.88 per copy).

recommendation_template: If carrying pathogenic variants, discuss enhanced screening (MRI, mammography) and risk reduction options with a genetic counselor.

studies.title: Average risks of breast and ovarian cancer associated with BRCA1 or BRCA2 mutations
studies.finding: BRCA1 carriers: 65% cumulative breast cancer risk by age 70

studies.title: Genome-wide association study identifies novel breast cancer susceptibility loci
studies.finding: GWAS identifies multiple common variants in FGFR2, TOX3, MAP3K1, and 8q24 associated with BC risk
